title: Graph Layout Algorithm
scenario: Create a prompt for an LLM to generate a high-quality graph layout algorithm based on a given set of graph nodes and edges. The prompt should take the graph nodes and edges as input and output a well-documented graph layout algorithm as a Python code snippet.
constraints: Must include a clear explanation of the graph layout algorithm

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt adheres to the word limit and includes a clear explanation of the graph layout algorithm.
Check if the generated graph layout algorithm accurately places the graph nodes and edges.
Check if the generated code is well-formatted and easy to read.
